_meta.description: Full GPS polyline from GET /api/drives/{driveId}/route (rest-api.md §7.4), aligned to contracts DriveRoute (v0.7.0). routePoints is a non-empty ordered breadcrumb trail (oldest first); every RoutePoint carries all five fields (lat/lng/speed/heading/timestamp), none omitempty. Coordinates are a real trimmed live drive (Frisco -> Dallas, TX) so lat/lng exercise negative longitudes and whole-degree speed/heading values.
